invariants_acknowledged: Audit divergences (trpc-vs-api, no-auth-guard, edit-validation) PREDATE IFC-242 and were verified ALREADY unified — fixed only the genuine gaps (no shared component, edit lacked BANT, styling).
Shared LeadForm + single validateLeadFormValues path; createLeadSchema/updateLeadSchema are the single validation source; server re-validates.
Edit sends RAW tRPC input (z.input) — no transformed value objects on the wire (IFC-242 F9).
qualificationNote is create-only; estimatedValue cents<->dollars edit-only; BANT first-class preserved.
Page.tsx shells coverage-excluded; logic in LeadForm/change-tracker/lead-form-utils, tested same commit (#382).
ADR-046: Material Symbols, no inline decorative SVGs.
Create wizard kept (approved spec); >=30% LOC KPI recorded honestly as 18.7% (owner approved wizard-preserving ship).
All 4 validations mandatory: TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build.

validation_results.name: Lint
validation_results.command: pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:sonar:guard

kpi_results.actual: 18.7% (1980->1609 clean prettier-compliant); full duplication eliminated; 30% would require dropping the create wizard (owner approved deferring)
BANT + annualRevenue round-trip in create AND edit
130 lead tests + full web suite green; diff-coverage >=80%

definition_of_done_items.evidence: apps/web/src/components/leads/LeadForm.tsx — used by both create (wizard shell) and edit (wrapper)
both already use api/@/lib/api (tRPC) — verified, IFC-242

definition_of_done_items.criterion: All fields incl. BANT in both views

notes: IFC-230 unifies the lead create + edit forms on a shared data-driven LeadForm.tsx, adds BANT parity to the edit form, unifies validation/styling, and preserves the create wizard. The audit's API-client/auth/validation divergences were verified already-fixed by IFC-242. The >=30% LOC KPI is recorded honestly as 18.7% (clean, prettier-compliant, readable): a subagent only reached <=1386 via prettier-ignore + cryptic-name golf, which was REJECTED for quality; hitting 30% genuinely requires dropping the 3-step create wizard (UX change + test rewrites), which the owner approved deferring. 130 lead tests + full web suite (10821) green; typecheck/lint/sonar-guard clean; 0 'as any'; ADR-046 compliant. Compliance check PASS. git_commit recorded pre-attestation-commit.
